questions.question: What does the memory requirement of a dynamic programming algorithm scale to as the input size increases? Explain with an example from the given three basic examples of dynamic programming in Chapter 8.
questions.hint: Consider the relationship between the input size and space complexity

questions.question: Explain how the bottom-up dynamic programming approach differs from the top-down approach in solving the 0/1 Knapsack Problem.
questions.hint: Focus on the iterative vs recursive process

questions.question: How does the memoization technique used in dynamic programming help in avoiding redundant computation? Provide a specific example from the given three basic examples of dynamic programming in Chapter 8.
questions.hint: Emphasize the benefits of storing computed results
